name: Truffle (Fudge) Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: In a medium bowl, combine the:
Press firmly into the bottom of a 10-inch SPRINGFORM PAN.
3 packages CREAM CHEESE (8 oz. each), softened
1 can EAGLE BRAND SWEETENED CONDENSED MILK (14 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. In a medium bowl, combine the crumbles, powdered sugar, cocoa, and melted butter.
2. Press the mixture firmly into the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
4. Let cool completely.
CAKE
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add chocolate chips and beat until combined.
4. Stir in condensed milk, eggs, and vanilla extract until well mixed.
5. Pour the mixture into the cooled crust.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set.
7. Let cool at room temperature before refrigerating for at least 2 hours.
